feature_name: Cockpit Mode — SafeExecutor Integration + Approval UI
description: Intégration de SafeExecutor comme middleware de gouvernance dans XRoads. Chaque opération sensible déclenchée par un agent est interceptée, évaluée, dry-runnée, et présentée à l'humain via une approval card dans le slot concerné. Non-bypassable.
goals: Implémenter ExecutionGate persistence + cycle de vie ExecutionGateLifecycle
Implémenter l'approval card UI dans chaque slot avec approve/reject en un clic
Afficher l'audit trail par session dans le Cockpit
non_goals: Implémenter SafeExecutor NPM package lui-même (déjà fait)
Webhook Slack approval (roadmap SafeExecutor, hors scope XRoads v1)

user_stories.title: ExecutionGate persistence + lifecycle
user_stories.description: As SafeExecutor, I need ExecutionGate persisted in SQLite with its full lifecycle so that every gate request is tracked, audited, and non-bypassable.
acceptance_criteria: ExecutionGate table created with FK to AgentSlot
ExecutionGateRepository actor exposes create, updateStatus, writeAudit methods
Gate status follows ExecutionGateLifecycle strictly — no direct status override
audit_entry written as immutable JSON on completion or rollback

tests.desc: Should keep ExecutionGate linked to AgentSlot
Should transition ExecutionGate from pending to dry_run when policy allows with dry-run
Should reject gate when policy denies

unit_test.name: test_execution_gate_persistence
unit_test.description: Validates ExecutionGate SQLite persistence and lifecycle transitions
assertions: should create ExecutionGate with FK to AgentSlot
should transition through lifecycle states correctly
should write immutable audit_entry on completion
should reject direct status override bypassing lifecycle

user_stories.technical_notes: ExecutionGateRepository as Swift actor. GRDB.swift. audit_entry: Codable JSON blob. Lifecycle transitions via ExecutionGateStateMachine service.

user_stories.title: SafeExecutorInterceptor in PTYProcessRunner
user_stories.description: As the orchestrator, I need PTYProcessRunner to intercept sensitive operations from agent stdout before they execute, create an ExecutionGate, and suspend the agent process pending approval.
acceptance_criteria: PTYProcessRunner detects [SAFEEXEC:{...}] prefixed lines from agent stdout
SafeExecutorInterceptor creates ExecutionGate record from parsed intent
Agent process suspended (SIGSTOP or stdin blocked) immediately on gate creation
AgentSlot transitions from running to waiting_approval
Slot card in UI shows waiting_approval badge and approval card

tests.desc: Should transition AgentSlot from running to waiting_approval on gate trigger

unit_test.name: test_safe_executor_interceptor
unit_test.description: Validates stdout interception, gate creation, and agent suspension
assertions: should detect [SAFEEXEC:] prefix in agent stdout
should create ExecutionGate from parsed intent
should suspend agent process on gate creation

user_stories.technical_notes: SKILL.md injects SafeExecutor protocol: agent emits [SAFEEXEC:{op_type, raw_intent, risk_level}] before any sensitive operation. Interceptor parses with Codable JSON. Process suspension via PTY signal.

user_stories.title: Approval Card UI per slot — one-click approve or reject
user_stories.description: As a user (the Board), I need an approval card to appear in the slot UI when an ExecutionGate is pending, showing the operation details and risk level, with approve and reject buttons.
acceptance_criteria: Approval card overlays slot terminal when AgentSlot is in waiting_approval state
Card shows: operation_type, raw_intent, risk_level badge, dry_run_result summary, estimated impact
Approve button: transitions gate to executing, resumes agent process
Reject button: transitions gate to rejected, notifies agent via stdin
AgentSlot transitions back to running on gate_approved or gate_rejected

tests.desc: Should transition ExecutionGate from awaiting_approval to executing on approve
Should block approval without human confirmation
Should transition AgentSlot back to running after gate resolved

unit_test.name: test_approval_card_ui
unit_test.description: Validates approval card display, approve/reject flow, and lifecycle transitions
assertions: should display approval card when slot is in waiting_approval
should show risk_level badge with appropriate color
should call approve and transition gate to executing
should resume agent process after approval
should transition slot back to running

user_stories.technical_notes: ApprovalCardView as SwiftUI overlay on TerminalSlotView. Risk color: low=green, medium=yellow, high=orange, critical=red.

user_stories.title: Audit trail display in Cockpit
user_stories.description: As a user, I need to see the full audit trail of all ExecutionGates for the active CockpitSession so I can review what agents did, what was approved, and what was rolled back.
acceptance_criteria: Audit Trail panel accessible from Cockpit toolbar
Lists all ExecutionGates for active CockpitSession, sorted by created_at desc
Each entry shows: slot_index, operation_type, risk_level, status, approved_by, duration
Expandable row shows full audit_entry JSON
ExecutionGate transitions to completed with immutable audit_entry written

tests.desc: Should transition ExecutionGate from executing to completed on success
Should transition ExecutionGate to rolled_back on anomaly

unit_test.name: test_audit_trail_display
unit_test.description: Validates audit trail panel display and gate status rendering
assertions: should list all gates for active session sorted desc
should show completed and rolled_back gates distinctly
should expand row to show full audit_entry JSON
should write immutable audit_entry on gate completion

user_stories.technical_notes: AuditTrailView as sheet/panel. audit_entry immutable: written once on success or rolled_back, never updated after.

functional_requirements.description: Aucune opération sensible ne s'exécute sans passer par ExecutionGateLifecycle complet
L'approval card est non-bypassable : pas de --force, pas de skip
L'audit trail est immutable : audit_entry ne peut être modifié après écriture
Le rollback est automatique sur anomalie d'exécution — sans intervention humaine

technical_considerations: SafeExecutor NPM package déjà disponible à /Users/birahimmbow/Projets/SafeExecutor
Protocol stdout SKILL.md : agent émet [SAFEEXEC:{...}] avant toute opération sensible
AST parser universel dans SafeExecutor — intent normalisé quelle que soit la source
XRoads appelle SafeExecutor via IPC ou HTTP local sur port dédié
success_metrics: 0 opération sensible exécutée sans approval card affichée
Approval card affichée en moins de 1 seconde après interception
100% des gates auditées avec audit_entry complet
Rollback automatique déclenché en moins de 500ms sur anomalie
